scripts.install:deps: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix desktop-electron install
scripts.ci:deps: npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix frontend ci
scripts.build:monolith: npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate && npm run build:frontend:public && npm run build:backend
scripts.artifact:monolith: npm run build:monolith && npm run package:monolith
